rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike GRANTED. Paragraphs 666, 71, 107, 110 and Prayer for Relief Nos. 3 and 7 are stricken in so far as they allege punitive damages against SFHA, a government entity. (See Gov. Code §818.) Plaintiff has 10 days to file amended complaint. (CRC 3.1320(g))= (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as follows: Allege facts sufficient to demonstrate compliance with administrative exhaustion. If Plaintiff wishes to bring all causes of action against all defendants, Plaintiff must allege sufficient facts to sustain each cause of action against each defendant, including SFHA. Alternatively, if Defendant would like to request a continuance of a hearing to allow sufficient time to file an additional Reply, they may do so. = (501/CFH)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT SANDRA PIERCE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to: Sufficiently allege breach under causes of action 1 and 2; Allege facts sufficient to withstand judicial estoppel (specifically ignorance, fraud or mistake) and jurisdiction issues raised by Defendant arising out of all claims to any earnings, income, assets, property, or claims prior to the January 7, 2010 bankruptcy filing OR amend complaint to omit any earnings, income, assets, property, or claims prior to January 7, 2010 that were not listed in the bankruptcy filing. Plaintiff has 10 days to file amended complaint. (CRC 3.1320(g)) = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MELISSA OSBORNE-ROBINSON VS. SEVERA REED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT STEVEN OSBORNE Claim Of Right To Possession And Notice Of Hearing DENIED. Possession is not at issue in this action, there is no judgment and no writ in this action. Action has been dismissed on December 5, 2018. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HAROLD BRANDEL ET AL VS. 661 HOWARD STREET LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application & Application To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs Against Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT 661 HOWARD STREET LLC Notice Of Application & Application To Expunge Lis Pendens And Request For Award Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs Against Plaintiffs GRANTED. Opposition failed to establish by a preponderance of the evidence the probable validity of the real property claim. (CCP §405.32.) The Court awards $9,160.00 in attorney fees. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN INC VS. CARL H SAXEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 29, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT CARL SAXEN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)
